description: Smart auto casualty allocation: with 'computer allocates wounds' ON, the 11e AllocationGroupOverlay resolves a 4-wound AP-3 attack against Boyz F (5+ save, auto-fails) using CasualtyPreference's die-first order instead of lowest-index. Verifies the exact bases the module ranked first are the ones removed, that the farthest-from-enemy model survives, and that 4 casualties land in GameState with no defender clicks.
